short_summary: Iran deal near, Tren de Aragua killed
rationale: The US airstrike killing the Tren de Aragua leader continues as a notable domestic security story, while the Iran deal proximity remains the top geopolitical watch item for Americans.

top_events.title: US kills Tren de Aragua gang leader in airstrike
top_events.summary: Trump confirms US airstrike eliminated the leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang, continuing the administration's aggressive posture against foreign criminal organizations operating in the US.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal reported near; 'lots can still go wrong'
top_events.summary: A potential US-Iran agreement could reduce Middle East tensions and stabilize oil prices for American consumers, but remains unconfirmed with significant risks of collapse.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends AI tools for foreign nationals on US government order
top_events.summary: US government security concerns prompt Anthropic to disable AI models for non-US users; signals tightening federal oversight of AI with potential domestic policy implications.
